race.comment: ALWAYS FREE (9) made a nice impression on debut at Werribee when sitting on speed and boxing on for a narrow defeat, beaten half a length. She should only come on from that and looks the clear one to beat. WHO'LLSTOPLORRAINE (13) has been going okay in her maiden campaign, battling away on very heavy ground at Geelong when last seen in fourth. She'll be rock hard fit, up on speed and take plenty of getting by. FRENCH ROMANCE (11) is a filly by Maurice on debut for the Griffiths yard who can run well despite drawing wide. NO DOUBT CORAL (4) is a gelding by Doubtland for the Clayton Douglas yard who has jumped out well enough with Mott booked, respecting.
